Process
How It Works
Designed for indie filmmakers. Minimal friction, maximum certainty.
01
🔍
Search & Filter
Browse by vibe, area, specs, and availability. No exact addresses shown until booking is confirmed.
02
📅
Book or Recce
Book directly online with instant confirmation, or request a €25 recce visit first. The fee credits against your booking.
03
🎬
Film
Arrive with your full address, production terms confirmed, and host prepared. Everything is documented. Just shoot.
Transparent Fees
Simple Pricing
One booking fee to filmmakers. One commission from hosts. No hidden charges.
Standard
€18 /hr
Entry-level spaces. Perfect for tight indie budgets and competition shorts.
  • Online booking
  • Instant confirmation
  • 8% filmmaker fee
  • Production terms included
Mid-Range
€25–30 /hr
Most popular tier. Versatile spaces with better specs and flexible availability.
  • All Standard features
  • Production spec sheet
  • Concierge support
  • Flexible rescheduling
Premium
€38+ /hr
Distinctive, high-spec locations for grant-funded and international productions.
  • All Mid-Range features
  • Location manager on-site
  • Priority booking window
  • Multi-day rate available
Why BTL
Built for Indie Film
🔒
Privacy by Design
No exact addresses visible until booking is confirmed and paid. Hosts control what is revealed at each stage.
📋
Production-Ready Terms
Every booking includes a host agreement and filmmaker booking terms. No informal Facebook negotiations.
💳
Transparent Fees
12% from hosts, 8% from filmmakers. 20% combined — below international platforms. No surprise charges.
📍
Malta-Specific
Built for Malta’s indie film community. Real locations, real filmmakers, real understanding of local production culture.
🤝
Community First
Early hosts earn zero commission for 6 months. Early filmmakers get priority access to new listings.
🎯
Recce Filter
A €25 refundable recce fee filters serious enquiries — protecting hosts’ time and keeping the platform credible.
For Property Owners
List Your Space
Malta’s filmmakers are actively looking for locations like yours. Turn your space into a production asset.
💶
Earn Per Shoot
🔒
Privacy Controlled
📄
Legal Terms Provided
🎬
Vetted Filmmakers Only
0%
Zero Fee — First 6 Months
